task_completion.description: Open and read the transfer request file to identify the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or file viewer displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/transfer_request.txt' with the target patient's details visible.

task_completion.description: Log into the LibreHealth EHR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the LibreHealth EHR login screen with 'admin' entered, or the main LibreHealth EHR dashboard visible after a successful login.

task_completion.description: Search for and open the specified patient's clinical record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR interface showing a search for the patient's name (matching the text file) or the specific patient's chart/dashboard actively open.

task_completion.description: Initiate the C-CDA or CCR XML export for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The export module, Care Coordination Document (CCD), C-CDA, or CCR generation screen open in LibreHealth EHR for the correct patient, with a button clicked or process running to generate the XML.

task_completion.description: Save the exported XML file to the specified destination.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser download dialog, file manager, or terminal showing the exported file being saved, moved, or verified exactly at '~/Documents/Transfer/export.xml'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreHealth EHR GUI via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show a web browser navigating the LibreHealth EHR interface, rather than the agent using terminal scripts or direct database queries to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The exported record belongs to the specific patient requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient name visible in the EHR export screen or the downloaded file name must correspond to the patient requested in the transfer_request.txt file, not a random patient.

integrity.description: The XML file was genuinely exported from the EHR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file should originate from a browser download action from the LibreHealth EHR system, rather than the agent manually typing out a fake XML file in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The transfer request file is located at /home/ga/Desktop/transfer_request.txt. LibreHealth EHR credentials are admin / password. The final exported file must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/Transfer/export.xml. The EHR contains real NHANES patient data, so the patient name will be dynamically selected and must match between the text file and the EHR search.
